headline: Zurich warns data centre boom is outpacing insurance capacity – report
summary: Kelly Kinzer, the company's global head of construction and surety, told Bloomberg that securitisation products – which would channel data centre risk to a wider base of investors – do not yet exist in any meaningful form.

content.title: Zurich warns data centre boom is outpacing insurance capacity – report
content.summary: Kelly Kinzer, the company's global head of construction and surety, told Bloomberg that securitisation products – which would channel data centre risk to a wider base of investors – do not yet exist in any meaningful form.
